steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The word “But” after the opening sentence signals a shift: historians agree the Piast dynasty shaped the Polish state, but then some scholars split the dynasty into well‑documented rulers like Otto Bolesławowic and less certain figures like Siemowit whose historicity rests on oral tradition. This contrast is the decisive clue.

steps.title: Match the purpose to the contrast
steps.content: Choice D captures this contrast by saying the text explains why historians differ in their treatment of an aspect of Polish history. The other three either compare reigns, describe authentication of a chronicle, or focus on Otto Bolesławowic, none of which matches the shift signaled by “But”. That matches choice D — D is correct.
